popup.title-3: Customized total relocation solutions for you

homeHeroBanner.slide-1-content-1: Your personal immigration planner, the efficient way to connect with Canadian immigrants
homeHeroBanner.slide-1-content-2: One-stop planning for the whole process. No detours for immigrants!

homeServices.row-1-content: Canada Start-up Program, Canada employer sponsored immigration, Canada Ontario, Manitoba, B.C. Saskatchewan Canada PNP provincial nominee immigration. Canada study abroad experience class immigration. Canada entrepreneurial immigration, Canada cultural and sports self-employment immigration, Agri-food immigration pilot, oceanic four provinces AIP employer sponsorship, Canada Express Entry, EE plus 50 points, EE plus 200 Points, Canadian family reunion immigration.
homeServices.row-4-title: Services for New Immigrants to Canada
homeServices.row-3-content: We provide students with a guaranteed admissions community, background assessment, school/major selection application submission, and a decade of youth program, from reception and placement services after landing in Canada, to valid status during study abroad.
homeServices.row-2-content: Canada school visa, in-country travel visa to school visa, Canada work visa, in-country travel visa to work visa, Canada executive start-up LMIA, Canada corporate executive dispatch visa, Canada entrepreneur work visa, Canada LMIA labor endorsement, Canada tourist visa, Canada tourist visa in-country renewal Visitor Record, Canada super visa.
homeServices.row-4-content: We provide new immigrants to Canada with a personalized settlement service. You will not be overwhelmed by the unfamiliar environment when you first land. We provide temporary housing, assistance in renting and buying a home, pick-up service, personal insurance, bank account opening, credit card application, assistance in applying for a driver's license, tax consultation, etc. We help our overseas clients and students by connecting them to each other and serving them with our heart.

homeAbout.content-2: Canada Pays is a local Canadian company that is authorized to handle the Canadian Provincial Nominee Program. As a Canadian program provider, we maintain an exclusive program advantage and always have a high market share, each consultant has many years of experience living and working abroad. Most importantly, we treat each of our clients as if they were our own family members, assisting you in assessing the reality of your situation and making the most appropriate planning recommendations in provincial nomination programs across Canada. As always, we will work closely with our domestic partners and provide the best and most professional immigration consulting services in the spirit of customer first.
homeAbout.content-1: Beyond Canada includes BEYOND CANADA CONSULTING, BISON EDUCATION and BEYONDCANADA INCESTMENT which are all federally registered companies in Canada and are partnered with the immigration lawyers, RCIC (Regulatory Council of Immigration Consultants of Canada) licensed immigration consultants, education consultants, vocational trainers, real estate agents, accountants and business experts.

homeSlogan.content: We are committed to helping you and your family plan the immigration project that best meets your needs and customize your immigration program so that you and your family can make a home on the other side of the world and enjoy better education, health care, social welfare and steady appreciation of your family assets. Beyond Canada, Your Family.
homeSlogan.tag-2: Co-founder of C101 Youth Venture Club
homeSlogan.tag-3: Board Member of Lambert Angel Investor Alliance

About.mission-content: We are moving away from the "survival-oriented" approach of traditional education and giving everyone the opportunity to choose an international education.
About.advantages-1: Directly operated in Canada, providing comprehensive cross-border services between China and Canada
About.advantages-2: Licensed immigration attorneys evaluate and review the entire process
About.advantages-3: Guaranteed success with a team of licensed lawyers and experienced project team
